author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Each orthogonal-basis module had two pairwise From impls (Polynomial<->Chebyshev, Polynomial<->Legendre, etc.) duplicating the basis-conversion logic already exposed via ConvertBasis::convert<T>() (blanket-impl'd via ToPowerBasis + FromPowerBasis using the canonical power-basis pivot). The From impls also silently swallowed any conversion errors that ConvertBasis surfaces.

Verified no callers anywhere in the workspace use the bare ::from(X) form - only Self::from_power_basis() and .convert::<T>(). Deleted 10 impls (5 modules x 2 directions).

ferray-polynomial: 146 tests pass, clippy clean. Net -61 lines. Commit 718d03da.
